message:
feat: add interactive WASM demo with 15 live exhibits

Self-contained HTML demo that loads the real asupersync WASM runtime
(via jsDelivr CDN or local) and demonstrates structured concurrency,
cancel-correct channels, four-valued outcomes, generation-counted
handles, cascade close, and the cancel-then-join protocol — all
running live in the browser.

15 exhibits: ABI handshake, runtime lifecycle, region tree, task
lifecycle, outcome algebra, cancel protocol with Tokio comparison,
three-lane scheduler, budget algebra, two-phase effects, stale
handle rejection, deep cascade close, cancel→join protocol
enforcement, live REPL, chaos stress test (200 ops, zero leaks),
and live HTTP fetch with mid-flight cancellation.

Uses motion@12.36.0 for spring-physics scroll animations. GitHub
Pages enabled for hosting at dicklesworthstone.github.io/asupersync/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
